calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RYAN L. DAHM OF THE COOK COLLECTION ATTORNEYS, TEL. NO. 1-415-989-4730 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF A&B PRODUCE, INC's Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is granted. The Court has reviewed the supplemental briefing and evidence required by Judge Pro Tem Wohl and concludes that the statutory guidelines have been satisfied. No Opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-Tem: David Mcdonald; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jul-15-2016 Continued To Aug-05-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PLAINTIFF A&B PRODUCE, INC., Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is continued to August 5, 2016, on the Court's motion. Judge Pro Tem: Jeff Wohl; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
